description: Verified header links Blog, Portfolio, Videos, and Contact correctly navigate to their respective routes; however, the Home link is labeled 'okwasniewski' and a PostHog configuration error causes a console exception on load.

issues.name: Header link labeled 'okwasniewski' instead of 'Home'
issues.description: Expected: The header link to the root page should be labeled 'Home' as specified in the verification list. Actual: The header link to the root page (/) is labeled 'okwasniewski' instead of 'Home'. All other links (blog, portfolio, videos, contact) are present and functional.
reproductionSteps: Verify the link to the root page (/) is labeled 'okwasniewski' instead of 'Home'.
issues.expectedBehavior: The header link to the root page should be labeled 'Home' as specified in the verification list.
issues.actualBehavior: The header link to the root page (/) is labeled 'okwasniewski' instead of 'Home'. All other links (blog, portfolio, videos, contact) are present and functional.

issues.name: PostHog initialization error (misconfiguration)
issues.description: Expected: The application should load without console errors, and PostHog should be initialized with a valid token or not at all if not configured. Actual: The console shows 'TypeError: a is undefined' at 685-6184cc1b7f03bc7e.js:1:3503, and the logs indicate 'PostHog was initialized without a token'. This occurs on page load.
reproductionSteps: Observe the 'TypeError: a is undefined' error and PostHog initialization error message.
issues.expectedBehavior: The application should load without console errors, and PostHog should be initialized with a valid token or not at all if not configured.
issues.actualBehavior: The console shows 'TypeError: a is undefined' at 685-6184cc1b7f03bc7e.js:1:3503, and the logs indicate 'PostHog was initialized without a token'. This occurs on page load.
